request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a possible strike from "ATAC" (the public transport company of Rome, Lazio (12)). IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time updates about an ongoing strike (e.g., "the metro is currently closed due to a strike"), set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGIONAL", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: Roma Servizi per la Mobilità, domani attività a rischio per sciopero - Roma Servizi per la Mobilità

Roma Servizi per la Mobilità, domani attività a rischio per sciopero

Pubblicato il: 23/10/2024 - Aggiornato il: 06/11/2024

Domani, per lo sciopero indetto dal sindacato Usb, sono possibili disagi per le attività di Roma Servizi per la Mobilità. 

A rischio il regolare funzionamento dello sportello al pubblico di via Silvio D’Amico 40 e del contact center 0657003.

Aggiornamenti su romamobilita.it
